# gigahost_dns_zones (Data Source)

Lists the DNS zones on the Gigahost account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List the DNS zones on the Gigahost account.
data "gigahost_dns_zones" "all" {}

output "dns_zones" {
  value = data.gigahost_dns_zones.all.zones
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `zones` (Attributes List) DNS zones on the account. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--zones))

<a id="nestedatt--zones"></a>
### Nested Schema for `zones`

Read-Only:

- `external_dns` (Boolean) Whether the zone is served by external nameservers.
- `zone_active` (Boolean) Whether the zone is active.
- `zone_id` (String) Zone id.
- `zone_name` (String) Domain name.
- `zone_protected` (Boolean) Whether the zone is protected against deletion.
- `zone_type` (String) Zone type (NATIVE, MASTER, or SLAVE).
